name: PM-KISAN
description: Income support of ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments to eligible landholding farmer families.
eligibility_summary: Small and marginal farmers with cultivable land; family definition as per scheme guidelines.

name: PMFBY — Crop Insurance
description: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana provides affordable crop insurance against natural calamities and pests.
eligibility_summary: Farmers growing notified crops in notified areas; loanee and non-loanee farmers.

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
description: Short-term credit for crop production and allied activities at concessional interest rates.
eligibility_summary: Farmers engaged in agriculture or allied activities with land or tenancy proof.

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Soil testing and recommendations for balanced fertilizer use to improve productivity.
eligibility_summary: All farmers can request soil health cards through agriculture department.

name: Agriculture Infrastructure Fund
description: Financing for post-harvest infrastructure including cold chains, sorting, and processing units.
eligibility_summary: FPOs, PACS, agri-entrepreneurs, and farmers meeting project criteria.
